creator: douglas@douglasthrift.net
text:
The permissions that www/py-httplib2 currently installs with make it so issues
can occur when trying to use it as a normal user:

/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/httplib2-0.8-py2.7.egg/EGG-INFO:
total 20
-rw-r-----  1 root  wheel  2337 Oct 22 22:32 PKG-INFO
-rw-r-----  1 root  wheel   787 Oct 22 22:32 SOURCES.txt
-rw-r-----  1 root  wheel     1 Oct 22 22:32 dependency_links.txt
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel     1 Oct 22 22:32 not-zip-safe
-rw-r-----  1 root  wheel     9 Oct 22 22:32 top_level.txt

/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/httplib2-0.8-py2.7.egg/httplib2:
total 300
-rwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel  69621 Oct 22 22:32 __init__.py
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  59973 Oct 22 22:32 __init__.pyc
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  59966 Oct 22 22:32 __init__.pyo
-rw-r-----  1 root  wheel  39670 Oct 22 22:32 cacerts.txt
-rwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel   3828 Oct 22 22:32 iri2uri.py
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   3960 Oct 22 22:32 iri2uri.pyc
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   3960 Oct 22 22:32 iri2uri.pyo
-rwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel  18459 Oct 22 22:32 socks.py
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  17784 Oct 22 22:32 socks.pyc
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  17784 Oct 22 22:32 socks.pyo

This was already reported upstream (https://code.google.com/p/httplib2/issues/detail?id=251),
but there is no fix there; there is, however, a fix in MacPorts at least.
